title: microsorum tenuinerve
intro: Microsorum tenuinerve, also known as the Fishbone Fern or Tenuinerve Fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, Microsorum tenuinerve is often used in infusions, decoctions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
